old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-oh58","title":"Create simulation infrastructure deployment documentation","description":"Create docs/simulation-infrastructure-deployment.md that details: 1) Overview and Architecture, 2) Components (lichen-sim coordinator, implementation nodes), 3) Deployment Methods (heterogeneous mesh testing, Renode-based Zephyr cluster), 4) Scaling Strategies, 5) AWS Resource Requirements, 6) Best Practices, 7) Automation Commands, 8) Troubleshooting, 9) Performance Optimization, 10) Testing Scenarios, 11) Maintenance Procedures.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-15T03:22:36.571326Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-15T03:22:36.571363Z"}
